programme.title: Football: Trampzonspor - Barcelona
programme.desc: UEFA Youth League 2024-25. Final. The 11th season of the UEFA Youth League includes 64 teams divided into two groups, each with 32 teams. Olympiacos is the holder of last year's title. The Colobrei Stadium in Nyon will host the semifinals and the final. Description: Christos Kyriazis.

programme.title: Football: Bologna - Genoa
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win the scandetto or the waterproof will again conquer the trophy description: Apostolis Panos.

programme.desc: Copa Libertadores 2025. Team phase, 6th racing. In the 66th season of the top South America event, there are 47 clubs from 10 countries. The Brazilian Botafogo is the trophy owner. Which team will conquer the precious trophy? Description: Paris Tselepidis.

programme.title: Football: Sporting Lisbon - Vittoria Guimaraes
programme.desc: Liga Portugal Betclic 2024-25. 34th race. The 91st season of the Portuguese League ends in May 2025. Until then, 18 teams will fight for the title, the positions that lead to Europe and the avoidance of relegation. Sporting Lisbon is the champion. Description: Kostas Gialitakis.

programme.desc: Copa Sudamericana 2025. Group phase, 6th race. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Football: Al Fatech - Al Nasr
programme.desc: Roshn Saudi League 2024-25. 34th race. The Saudi Arabian league brings 18 teams in the 2024-25 season, in which great stars, such as Cristiano Ronaldo. Al-Hilal is Polynesian with 19 titles, having won last year's championship. Description: Andreas Sereveta.

programme.desc: Liga Portugal Betclic 2024-25. 34th race. The 91st season of the Portuguese League ends in May 2025. Until then, 18 teams will fight for the title, the positions that lead to Europe and the avoidance of relegation. Sporting Lisbon is the champion. Description: Apostolis Panos.

programme.desc: Rich themes, interesting interviews and super spectacle every week on Pick N 'Roll's basketball show.

programme.title: Basketball: Basconia - Bilbao
programme.desc: ACB LIGA ENDESA 2024-25. 33rd race. The leading Spanish basketball championship features European superpowers such as Barcelona, ​​Basconia, Gran Canaria, Unikaha Malaga, as well as the leader Real Madrid. A total of 18 groups claim the title, including the newly enlightened Gida and Coruna. Description: Aris Barkas.

programme.title: Football: Betis - Chelsea (G)
programme.desc: UEFA Conference League 2024-25. Final. Betis and Chelsea will fight for the UEFA Conference League trophy in Wroclaw. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: WRC 2025
programme.desc: Portugal, SS23 Felgueiras 2. Watch the World Rally Championship of 2025. Description: Yiannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: WRC 2025
programme.desc: Portugal, SS24 FAFE 2 Wolf Power Stage. Watch the 2025 World Rally Championship. Description: Yiannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: WRC 2024
programme.desc: Portugal, race review. Watch the 2024 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: ROC Race of Champions 2025
programme.desc: Fight. Enjoy the international championship that takes place every year, with the participation of some of the world's best racing guides. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: WRC 2024
programme.desc: Portugal, race review. Watch the 2024 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: Moto-E World Championship 2025
programme.desc: France - 1st race. The seventh season of the Motoe World Cup for electric motorcycles. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: Moto-E World Championship 2025
programme.desc: France - 2nd race. The seventh season of the Motoe World Cup for electric motorcycles. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: GT World Challenge Europe 2025
programme.desc: Netherlands. The GT World Challenge Europe is a series of races of modified cars following FIA GT3 regulations.

programme.title: MotoGP: Dream On Ε1
programme.desc: Sports documentaries.

programme.title: Motorsports: Moto3 2025
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK (Race). The 2025 World Fim Moto3 Championships together 13 teams from 2 manufacturers, as well as 27 riders, competing in 22 Grand Prix. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: Motorsports: Moto2 2025
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK (Race). The Fim Moto2 World Championships 2025 includes 15 teams of 3 manufacturers and a total of 30 riders. The final winner will be judged through 22 exciting Grand Prix. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: Motorsports: MotoGP 2025
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK (Race). The Fim MotoGP 2025 World Championship includes 11 teams and 22 riders, claiming the title through 22 Grand Prix. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Germany, Laucinging (1st race). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Kyriazis.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Γερμανία, Λάουσιτσρινγκ (2ος Αγώνας). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: MotoGP 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK. MotoGP, the World Motorcycle Championship, offers many emotions. Watch a concentrated version of what happened in one of the 2024 races.

programme.title: Motorsports: MotoGP 2025
programme.desc: Grand Prix (Tissot Sprint). The Fim MotoGP 2025 World Championship includes 11 teams and 22 riders, claiming the title through 22 Grand Prix. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: Grand Prix 2025 broadcast
programme.desc: The broadcast for all developments in motor sport championships hosted by COSMOTE TV (MotoGP, WRC, ERC, DTM).

programme.title: MotoGP 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK. MotoGP, the World Motorcycle Championship, offers many emotions. Watch a concentrated version of what happened in one of the 2024 races.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS12 TES 2. With a start year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS13 Nagyloter 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: Fim World Women's Motorcycle Championship 2024
programme.desc: Italy (1st race). The World Women's Motorcycle Championship is a series of women only races and includes six rounds and a preparation test, all integrated into the World Superbike World Championships. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: Fim World Women's Motorcycle Championship 2024
programme.desc: Italy (2nd race). The World Women's Motorcycle Championship is a series of women only races and includes six rounds and a preparation test, all integrated into the World Superbike World Championships. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: MotoGP: There Can Be Only One Κ3 Ε1
programme.desc: Athletic documentary.

programme.title: Snapshots: Roc Nations Cup 2025
programme.desc: Some of the best drivers in the world have the unique opportunity to compete in identical cars to judge who is the fastest of all.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS11 Iszka 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS12 TES 2. With a start year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS13 Nagyloter 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Gearing Up 2025 Ε4
programme.desc: Exciting races from the most demanding events. Rocky terrain, deep rivers, exhaustive races in the desert, dirt roads and asphalt speed races. Enjoy all this in a row full of action.

programme.title: Red Bull MotoGP Rookies Cup 2024
programme.desc: France, Le Man - 1st race. 2024 is the 18th season of the Rookies Cup, with 235 riders from 38 countries. Starting from Portugal in April, the series is transferred to Europe's classic Grand Prix and ends in Misano, Italy in September. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: Red Bull MotoGP Rookies Cup 2024
programme.desc: France, Le Man - 2nd race. 2024 is the 18th season of the Rookies Cup, with 235 riders from 38 countries. Starting from Portugal in April, the series is transferred to Europe's classic Grand Prix and ends in Misano, Italy in September. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: Grand Prix 2025 broadcast
programme.desc: The broadcast for all developments in motor sport championships hosted by COSMOTE TV (MotoGP, WRC, ERC, DTM).

programme.desc: Hungary, SS11 Iszka 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.desc: Hungary, SS12 TES 2. With a start year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.desc: Grand Prix UK. MotoGP, the World Motorcycle Championship, offers many emotions. Watch a concentrated version of what happened in one of the 2024 races.

programme.title: WRC 2025
programme.desc: Portugal, SS24 FAFE 2 Wolf Power Stage. Watch the 2025 World Rally Championship. Description: Yiannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Germany, Lositzrid. The German DTM Tourism Championship brings to the friends of motor sport action, speed and craftsmanship from leading international drivers.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Germany, Laucinging (1st race). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Kyriazis.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Γερμανία, Λάουσιτσρινγκ (2ος Αγώνας). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: WRC 2024
programme.desc: Portugal, race review. Watch the 2024 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Germany, Lositzrid. The German DTM Tourism Championship brings to the friends of motor sport action, speed and craftsmanship from leading international drivers.

programme.title: Grand Prix 2025 broadcast
programme.desc: The broadcast for all developments in motor sport championships hosted by COSMOTE TV (MotoGP, WRC, ERC, DTM).

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (3rd Women's Location Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (women's final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Handball: Magdeburg - Eisenach
programme.desc: Daikin Bundesliga 2024-25. 16th race. The 60th season of the German Handball Championship lasts from August 2024 to June 2025. Of the 18 teams involved, two are relegated, while the top 5 secures a European ticket. Magdeburg won last year's title. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Tennis: Men's Greek - Women's Cup 2025
programme.desc: Double Women's Final. See the tennis matches of the Greek Cup. Description: Marisa Georgitsis, Yiannis Kyfonidis.

programme.title: Water Sports: The Sailing World 2025 E4
programme.desc: Sailing is a very special sport. The show presents the heart of sailing, from the elegance and prestige of the amazing yachts to the durability it needs in the struggles and the hard world of Dinghy and Kite Surfing Games.

programme.title: Jet Ski World Series 2024
programme.desc: Thailand. Reaching 100km/h in less than 3.8 seconds and with a horsepower of 500 horses, riders are called upon to turn 30 degrees at speeds of 140 km/h. Without protective equipment, fighting with waves and gravity.

programme.title: Premier Padel Tour 2025
programme.desc: Asunion (women's final). Premier Padel is the only event that offers official players and P1 tournaments award 1000 points and a big cash prize to the winners.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (3rd Women's Location Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (women's final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Sports Classics: The Outdoor Sports Show 2025 Ε5
programme.desc: This series presents a wide range of outdoor sports as well as the athletes who compete in them. The show covers from professional and entertainment to extreme sports, such as marathon races, climbing, skiing, surfing, hiking, triathlon, sailing and cycling.

programme.title: Volleyball: Milan - Vakifbank
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Volleyball: Cononliano - Skandici
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. Women's Final. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Boxing: Tears Inue - Ramon Cardenna
programme.desc: Boxing 2025. Undisputed Super Bantamweight World Championship. Watch the most exciting boxing battles, where athletes from different countries and weight categories conflict for epic titles and cash prizes. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: ATP 500 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Hamburg. Watch the snapshots of the main matournahs of the ATP 500 tournaments, belonging to the 4th stage of the annual men's tennis events.

programme.title: Premier Padel Tour 2025
programme.desc: Asunion (men's final). Premier Padel is the only event that offers official players and P1 tournaments award 1000 points and a big cash prize to the winners. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε19
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Handball: Magdeburg - Eisenach
programme.desc: Daikin Bundesliga 2024-25. 16th race. The 60th season of the German Handball Championship lasts from August 2024 to June 2025. Of the 18 teams involved, two are relegated, while the top 5 secures a European ticket. Magdeburg won last year's title. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Premier Padel Tour 2025 - Snapshots
programme.desc: Qatar. The Premier Padel is the only event that offers official players and P1 tournaments award 1000 points and a big cash prize to the winners.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's 3rd place final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: ATP 500 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Hamburg. Watch the snapshots of the main matournahs of the ATP 500 tournaments, belonging to the 4th stage of the annual men's tennis events.

programme.title: Boxing: Tears Inue - Ramon Cardenna
programme.desc: Boxing 2025. Undisputed Super Bantamweight World Championship. Watch the most exciting boxing battles, where athletes from different countries and weight categories conflict for epic titles and cash prizes. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: Tennis: Men's Greek - Women's Cup 2025
programme.desc: Men's single final. See the tennis matches of the Greek Cup. Description: Marisa Georgitsis, Yiannis Kyfonidis.

programme.title: ATP 500 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Hamburg. Watch the snapshots of the main matournahs of the ATP 500 tournaments, belonging to the 4th stage of the annual men's tennis events.

programme.title: Premier Padel Tour 2025
programme.desc: Asunion (men's final). Premier Padel is the only event that offers official players and P1 tournaments award 1000 points and a big cash prize to the winners. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε9
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's 3rd place final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Volleyball: Jastrebsky Vegel - Halkbank
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. 3rd Men's Final. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Panos Loutas.

programme.title: Volleyball: Varta Zaviercie - Perugia
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. Men's final. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Panos Loutas.

programme.title: Handball: Fouss Berlin - Melsengen (G)
programme.desc: Daikin Bundesliga 2024-25. 31st Racing. The 60th season of the German Handball Championship lasts from August 2024 to June 2025. Of the 18 teams involved, two are relegated, while the top 5 secures a European ticket. Magdeburg won last year's title. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Athletics: World Athletics Continental Tour Gold 2025
programme.desc: Zagreb. The annual series of track and field rallies is the second -class event after the Diamond League and the first 'path' for athletes to the big events of classic sport, with a total of 12 events on 4 continents. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: Sports Classics: 2025 Sports Rundown Ε3
programme.desc: A fascinating journey to arenas, stadiums, gyms and places around the world, where the heartbeat of the hearts of sports echo. Athletes put everything in every sport but you have ever wondered about the person hiding behind the athlete

programme.title: Volleyball: Milan - Vakifbank
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Basketball: Fenerbahce - Turkish Telekom (G)
programme.desc: Turkish Basketball Super League 2024-25. Quarter -finals, 1st match. The 59th season of the Turkish basketball championship includes 16 teams. Yialvaspor and Mersin were promoted, while Fenerbahce is the title holder. Description: Rigas Dardalis.
